---
title: "Node.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tmp_interaction_test/Node.tsx"
loc: 3
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.60
style_score: 9.68
intel_score: 2.00
overall_score: 6.96
---

## Intent
React component rendering Node.

## Interaction Protocol
Include <Node /> within a React-Three-Fiber Canvas context.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `NeuralNode`
- `NeuralNode`
